title: athyrium setigerum
intro: Athyrium setigerum, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium setigerum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or dried to be used in infusions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
